svg.title: Multi-agent bedtime storyteller architecture
svg.desc: A 5-agent pipeline: user input flows through an intent classifier, genre-specific storyteller, scoring judge loop with revisor, extras generator, and human-in-the-loop feedback cycle.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how the intent classifier routes to 6 genre prompts')

svg.text: adventure · funny · educational · sleepy · fantasy · moral

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the storyteller agent prompting strategy')
sendPrompt('Explain how the judge scores stories on 5 criteria')
sendPrompt('Explain how the revisor incorporates judge feedback')
sendPrompt('Explain the parent companion guide extras')
